input: Run cohort analysis on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected cohort analysis output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the cohort analysis workflow

input: Apply cohort analysis to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive cohort analysis analysis with evidence-tagged findings
